description: Non-interactive pill displaying a chain / network name with an optional icon. The icon is marked aria-hidden since the name is already the text content; screen readers read "Base", not "Base Base".

screenReader.notes: If you use NetworkBadge as a trigger for a chain switcher, wrap it in a button and add an aria-label that conveys the action (e.g. "Switch network, currently Base").

contrast.text: Meets WCAG AA on default, outline, and subtle variants against the default theme

motion.reducedMotion: No animations beyond the standard color transition

consumerResponsibilities: Provide the chain icon via the `icon` slot; the component ships no chain registry.
Ensure the icon itself meets contrast requirements against the badge background.
